scenes.text:
Three words are destroying your potential. And
you say them every single day.

I cannot because. These three words have stopped more people than any obstacle ever could. Not because the obstacles were real, but because the belief
made them real. Your words program your subconscious. Every time you say I cannot, your brain files it as truth and stops looking for solutions.

Replace I cannot because with how can I despite. Watch
how fast your brain starts finding answers instead of excuses.

Your vocabulary is your destiny. Speak
like the person you are becoming.

Comment the three words you are
deleting today. Follow for mindset upgrades.
